caption: A screen recording displays a web browser window featuring a complex concept map with nodes and connecting lines against a black background. A small inset video window in the top right corner shows a man wearing a dark shirt and a headset with a microphone. The browser's address bar contains several open tabs, including "True Learning by Systemenics!", "Future of Society by Systemenics!", and "Rural Community Food System X". A white rectangular overlay contains a blue diagram with several boxes and arrows. On the far right of the screen, a vertical side panel displays small profile icons and the text "Guest Bedding". Across the sequence of frames, the visual elements remain static; the man in the inset video remains in the same position, and there is no movement or change in the diagrams or the browser interface, indicating a frozen or still moment within the recording.
